news.headline: Constellis achieved CMMC Level 2 certification by Cyber AB, vital for DoD compliance.
news.summary: In Herndon, Virginia, on March 13, 2025, the Cyber AB has granted Constellis certification at Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification (CMMC) Level 2. This certification is crucial as it aligns with the Department of Defense's framework to safeguard companies handling Controlled Unclassified Information.

news.headline: Tampa General Hospital partners with Lakeside Medical Center in Palm Beach County to enhance healthcare access.
news.summary: In a recent development, Tampa General Hospital has entered into a partnership with Lakeside Medical Center to offer comprehensive strategic, operational, and administrative assistance. The agreement, finalized in early 2025, between Tampa General Hospital, located in Tampa, Florida, and the Health Care District of Palm Beach County, will see Tampa General extending its support to Lakeside Medical Center. This collaboration signifies a significant move in enhancing healthcare services in the region.

news.headline: Blend appoints Sara Pryor as Chief People Officer to lead people strategy, focusing on talent development.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, in New York, Blend, a prominent provider of AI-driven data science solutions, revealed the establishment of the Chief People Officer (CPO) position. Sara Pryor has been selected to spearhead the company's human resources strategy. Pryor, with a wealth of experience in talent management, will be instrumental in shaping the company's workforce initiatives.

news.headline: Inventor from Texas creates COOL POCKET clothing to secure cold beverages; patented as CTK-1487.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 13, 2025, an inventor from Nacogdoches, Texas, shared the inspiration behind the creation of the COOL POCKET. This innovative product offers a solution for keeping a cold beverage handy while working outdoors by storing it in a pocket or article of clothing. The inventor noticed a need for this convenient storage option and developed a design that effectively maintains the beverage's chill. This invention aims to enhance comfort and convenience for individuals who require easy access to cold drinks during outdoor activities.

news.headline: Anyware Robotics raises $12M in seed funding led by GFT Ventures, deploying Pixmo commercially.
news.summary: A company based in Fremont, California, known as Anyware Robotics, which specializes in multi-purpose mobile robotics with advanced intelligence, revealed on March 13, 2025, that they have successfully raised $12 million in seed funding. The funding round was primarily backed by GFT Ventures, along with contributions from Foothill Ventures and Black.

news.headline: Binance's CZ refutes claims of Trump family investing/pardon talks. WSJ reported discussions for Trump family to acquire a stake in Binance's U.S. branch.
news.summary: According to a recent report, representatives of the Trump family are currently in discussions with Binance to potentially acquire a stake in the cryptocurrency exchange's U.S. division. The Wall Street Journal highlighted this development, indicating significant interest from both parties. The involvement of the Trump family in this negotiation adds an intriguing element to the narrative surrounding Binance and its expansion in the United States.

news.headline: Robinhood adds PENGU, PNUT, POPCAT memecoins as it boosts crypto trading; sees 700% yearly rise in crypto revenues. Regulatory changes favor the industry.
news.summary: Robinhood recently listed memecoins Pengu (PENGU), Pnut (PNUT), and Popcat (POPCAT) in a move to expand its crypto offerings and compete with exchanges like Coinbase. The demand for memecoin trading surged, leading to a 700% year-over-year increase in crypto revenues in February. This comes as rival exchanges also accelerate new coin listings following US President Donald Trump's election win. Robinhood, traditionally a stock trading platform, has been investing heavily in crypto products. Trump's push to make America the "world’s crypto capital" and regulatory changes have also impacted the landscape. The US SEC recently stated that most memecoins do not qualify as securities, a shift from the Biden administration's stance. This regulatory change, along with rising market prices, has fueled increased activity in crypto trading.

news.headline: United States energy drink market forecast to reach $41.36 billion by 2033, growing at 7.99% CAGR due to high demand among young adults and athletes.
news.summary: A recent report titled "United States Energy Drink Market Size and Share Analysis - Growth Trends and Forecast Report 2025-2033" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. It projects the United States energy drinks market to expand from US$ 20.71 billion in 2024 to US$ 41.36 billion in 2033, representing a CAGR of 7.99% during the period from 2025 to 2033. The surge can be attributed to the rising popularity of energy-boosting beverages among segments like young adults, athletes, and professionals. Continuous innovations in the sector also contribute to this growth.

news.headline: Three crypto firms, like Anchorage Digital, consult Treasury on safeguarding billions in Bitcoin reserve custody.
news.summary: Anchorage Digital, among other companies, is offering guidance to the U.S. government on strategies to protect crypto assets valued at billions of dollars.

news.headline: Investors fret over tariffs; S&P 500 nears a 10% drop from Feb. high. Wall Street's slump continues amid uncertainty.
news.summary: The S&P 500 is currently nearing a correction, with only a 10% decline from its peak in February. The uncertainty surrounding tariffs and trade negotiations continues to unsettle investors, leading to a volatile market environment.

news.headline: Monetate launches Analytics Cloud enabling direct access and analysis of data, integrating with Snowflake's Data Cloud.
news.summary: Monetate, a prominent personalization platform facilitating personalized digital connections between ecommerce brands and their worldwide customers, has introduced the Monetate Analytics Cloud in collaboration with Snowflake's Data Cloud. This new enterprise-level solution allows companies to effortlessly connect with Snowflake for direct access and analysis of their experimentation and personalization data. By integrating with Snowflake's Data Cloud, businesses can effectively eliminate silos and strengthen their measurement capabilities.

Travelers embarking on European adventures will have the opportunity to...

news.headline: Graybar reports record $11.6 billion in net sales for 2024, 100th anniversary celebration in 2025.
news.summary: In 2024, Graybar achieved a significant milestone with record-breaking net sales of $11.6 billion. The company is set to celebrate its 100th anniversary as an independent entity in 2025. Graybar, based in St. Louis, is a prominent distributor of electrical, industrial, automation, and connectivity products. This achievement positions Graybar as a key player in the supply chain sector, marking a successful century-long journey as an independent company.

news.headline: FTC requests delay in Amazon trial due to resource constraints from recent government cuts, later decides to meet court schedule. Staffing shortage cited.
news.summary: The Federal Trade Commission requested a delay in its trial against Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMZN) due to resource constraints caused by recent cuts from the Department of Government Efficiency. However, later the same day, the FTC decided to adhere to the court's schedule. FTC attorney Jonathan Cohen informed U.S. District Judge John Chun about the challenging situation, mentioning a reduction in staff within the agency, division, and case team, which he attributed to cost-cutting measures under the Trump administration. This change in stance came after initial concerns about meeting trial obligations due to limited resources. For more detailed information, please refer to Benzinga.com for the complete story.

news.headline: Goldman Sachs cuts FedEx forecast, lowers price target to $315 from $328. Analyst cites B2B weakness, tariffs, an industrial slowdown. EPS estimates for Q3 FY25 dropped to $4.40 from $4.65, and FY25 EPS estimates reduced from $18.85 to $18.65. FY26 EPS estimates lowered from $23.30 to $22.20.
news.summary: Analyst Jordan Alliger from Goldman Sachs has adjusted estimates for FedEx Corporation (NYSE:FDX) in anticipation of its third-quarter FY25 earnings report on March 20. Alliger, who rates the company as a Buy, has set a price target of $315, a decrease from the previous $328 forecast. In light of persistent transportation challenges, particularly in the industrial-exposed LTL sector, the analyst has decreased the third-quarter EPS estimates from $4.65 to $4.40. Moreover, Alliger has revised the FY25 EPS estimates downward from $18.85 to $18.65, attributing this adjustment to declines in volume within B2B parcel services such as U.S. Priority and Ground Commercial. Looking ahead to FY26, Alliger has reduced the EPS estimates from $23.30 to $22.20, primarily due to the expected decrease in B2B parcel volumes.

news.headline: Contract negotiations have stalled at The Gathering Place in St. John’s, Newfoundland and Labrador, moving to conciliation.
news.summary: In St. John’s, Newfoundland and Labrador, after nearly a year of negotiations for their inaugural contract, workers at The Gathering Place are transitioning to conciliation. The Gathering Place is a vital community health center catering to disadvantaged populations in St. John’s, such as individuals requiring physical and mental health assistance, low-wage earners, and those facing homelessness or food insecurity challenges. The primary aim is to deliver exceptional services to the clients of The Gathering Place and the vuln...

news.headline: EQT sells shares in Galderma Group AG for CHF 1.3 billion, EQT receives CHF 354 million. Landmark deal.
news.summary: The recent sale generated total gross proceeds of approximately CHF 1.3 billion, with EQT receiving around CHF 354 million. Stockholm, March 13, 2025 - Following earlier disclosures, EQT VIII's affiliate is delighted to confirm the finalization of the transaction.

news.headline: Posh wins Banker’s Choice Award at ICBA LIVE for AI banking solution after fintech pitches; chosen at national convention.
news.summary: Posh, an innovative provider of advanced conversational AI solutions for banks, revealed today that it was named the most promising solution at the recent ThinkTECH Showcase held during ICBA’s national convention in Nashville. The Banker’s Choice Award, backed by Fiserv, was decided by the audience consisting of community banking and industry figures after hearing presentations from fintech startup founders, with Posh emerging as the standout choice.

news.headline: US BOPIS market set to grow from $129.36B in 2024 to $509.4B by 2033, with a CAGR of 16.45% - driven by retailing trends and convenience.
news.summary: The report titled "United States BOPIS Market Size and Share Analysis - Growth Trends and Forecast Report 2025-2033" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The US BOPIS market, valued at approximately US$129.36 billion in 2024, is projected to escalate to US$509.4 billion by the conclusion of 2033. A significant compound annual growth rate of 16.45% is anticipated for the United States BOPIS market size during the period from 2025 to 2033. This remarkable growth trend signifies a substantial increase in demand for this convenient shopping method.

Harver launches Smart Job Navigator to match candidates to best-fit roles faster. Helps reduce rejection rates and drop-off.
news.summary: In New York, Harver, a top volume hiring solution provider, has introduced Smart Job Navigator, a state-of-the-art tool that aims to swiftly and effectively pair candidates with suitable positions. The tool addresses the common issue of candidates applying for ill-suited roles, leading to increased rejection rates. Additionally, lengthy screening procedures and repetitive applications contribute to a high dropout rate. With the Smart Job Navigator, Harver aims to enhance the hiring process by ensuring better candidate-role matches at a faster pace, thus improving overall efficiency.

news.headline: Trump: I still have a good relationship with the North Korean leader.

BTC dominance at 4-year high. ETH/BTC at 5-year low. Stablecoins surpass ETH mkt cap. UAE fund invests $2bn in Binance. Ripple gets Dubai license. Russia opens crypto trading. Rumble buys $17m BTC. Franklin files SOL ETF. Cantor Fitzgerald launches BTC lending. MEXC acquires $16m ENA, $20m USDe. India arrests Garantex co-founder.
news.summary: After the Consumer Price Index (CPI) report, the crypto rally took a hit. Bitcoin (BTC) dominance reached a four-year high while the Ethereum (ETH) to BTC ratio hit a five-year low. ETH slid out of the top 20 revenue-generating protocols. The market cap of stablecoins has exceeded that of ETH. The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) postponed options for the Fidelity ETH exchange-traded fund (ETF). The Federal Reserve designated BTC as a 'hard reserve asset'. The United Arab Emirates’ sovereign fund made a $2 billion investment in Binance. Ripple secured its first payments license in Dubai, but its settlement with the SEC might involve a sales ban. Russia is preparing to allow local residents to engage in crypto trading. Rumble purchased $17 million worth of BTC. Franklin submitted paperwork for a Solana (SOL) ETF in collaboration with the Chicago Board Options Exchange (CBOE). Cantor Fitzgerald launched a BTC-backed lending service. Lazarusa moved 400 ETH to Tornado Cash for privacy. MEXC acquired $16 million worth of ENA and $20 million of USDe. In India, a co-founder of Garantex was arrested.

news.headline: UAE official to press the US on ability to buy more Nvidia AI chips. $NVDA
Apploi partners with CentralReach, leading Autism and IDD Care software provider, enhancing workforce platform.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, in New York, Apploi, a prominent workforce platform for healthcare employers, revealed a recent collaboration with CentralReach, the top provider of Autism and IDD Care software for ABA, multidisciplinary, and special education services. This partnership aims to enhance employment opportunities and services within the healthcare industry, particularly for individuals with Autism and Intellectual/Developmental Disabilities (IDD). This move is set to impact a wide demographic, reflecting the companies' commitment to improving access to employment for individuals with diverse needs. The union of these two leading entities signifies the joining of forces to address gaps in employment resources and opportunities, ultimately benefiting both employers and job seekers alike. This strategic partnership is expected to catalyze positive changes in the healthcare employment landscape, ultimately fostering more inclusive and supportive work environments for all individuals involved.

news.headline: Photo Managers, Picturli, and Epson join forces in LA to support families affected by wildfires with photo digitizing; event on March 13, 2025.
news.summary: A recent local event in Los Alamitos, California held on March 13, 2025, along with an online series, is providing assistance to help families digitize their photos. This initiative aims to help families preserve their priceless memories while also supporting wildfire relief efforts following the Los Angeles fires. The event and online series offer digitizing services to convert physical photos into digital formats. This effort not only helps families safeguard their memories but also contributes to fundraising for wildfire relief. The community has come together to emphasize the significance of preserving memories and supporting those affected by the recent wildfires.

news.headline: Vantiva's 2024 results show positive FCF, adjusted EBITDA at 104M euros, sales up 19.3% to 1,865M euros, and SCS divestiture at 100M euros loss. CEO optimistic about connectivity business and cost synergies in 2025.
news.summary: Vantiva's 2024 financial results show sales increased by 19.3% to 1,865 million euros, with an Adjusted EBITDA of 104 million euros and Adjusted EBITA of 41 million euros. Net income from continuing operations was a loss of 161 million euros. The company had a positive Free Cash Flow of 33 million euros. Vantiva also held cash and cash equivalents of 30 million euros and a net nominal debt of 478 million euros. The SCS business unit divestiture is expected to incur an impairment of about 100 million euros. CEO Tim O'Loughlin stated that despite challenges, Vantiva met its 2024 guidance and is now focusing on connectivity businesses. For 2025, Vantiva expects sales to remain in line with 2024 levels, with adjusted EBITDA expected to exceed 150 million euros and positive Free Cash Flow.

news.headline: Daxa recognized in 2025 Gartner Market Guide for AI TRiSM for AI Governance and Runtime Inspection&Enforcement. AI security a pressing challenge as enterprises adopt AI rapidly.
news.summary: A renowned AI data security and governance company called Daxa has recently made it into the 2025 Gartner Market Guide for AI Trust, Risk & Security Management (AI TRiSM) for the AI Governance and Runtime Inspection and Enforcement category. This recognition comes as more companies are incorporating AI technologies into their operations. The need to safeguard AI applications against issues like data exposure, compliance breaches, and internal risks has become a critical concern. Many traditional security approaches and add-on AI defenses have proven insufficient in protecting AI during its operational phase.

Blanket partners with SPM to enhance operations & client experience with advanced technology, aiding SPM's growth.
news.summary: In Miami on March 13, 2025, Blanket, a prominent player in property management technology, revealed a strategic alliance with Specialized Property Management (SPM) aimed at leveraging cutting-edge tools to improve operations and customer satisfaction. The partnership aims to fuel SPM’s expansion efforts by offering advanced technological solutions.

news.headline: InventHelp inventor from El Paso, Texas creates CTK-1486 soundproof dog kennel to reduce anxiety in dogs during loud events.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 13, 2025, an inventor from El Paso, Texas shared their inspiration for creating a sound-proof product for dogs. The innovation aimed to alleviate anxiety during loud events like fireworks, storms, and air transportation. The inventor introduced the SOUNDPROOF DOG KENNEL to address these concerns.

Vantron launches VT-USB-AH-8108 Wi-Fi HaLow Dongle powered by Morse Micro's MM8108 chipset at Embedded World.

The compact VT-USB-AH-8108 offers powerful Wi-Fi connectivity, catering to the growing demand for efficient IoT solutions.

L.B. Foster Company to present at Sidoti Small Cap Virtual Conference on March 20, 2025 at 2:30 PM EST. CEO and CFO to speak. Materials to be posted morning of conference.

Foster Company (Nasdaq: FSTR) shared news that its President and CEO, John Kasel, and EVP and CFO, Bill Thalman, will attend the Sidoti Small Cap Virtual Conference on March 20, 2025, at 2:30 PM EST. news.headline: Kering announces Demna as Artistic Director of Gucci, a major move in fashion industry.
Non-lethal weapons market to reach US$18.28 billion by 2033 from US$12.34 billion in 2024 with a 4.46% CAGR.
news.summary: A report on the Non-Lethal Weapons Market projects significant growth, with an expected increase from US$12.34 billion in 2024 to US$18.28 billion by 2033. The compound annual growth rate (CAGR) from 2025 to 2033 is anticipated to be 4.46%. Factors driving this growth include heightened security concerns, demands for crowd control, law enforcement needs, human rights considerations, advancements in technology, and a shift towards less lethal military solutions. The report has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings.

news.headline: Managerial agreement signed on 7th March 2025 at AB Novaturas; Ugnius Radvila to sell 740,702 shares to Neset Kockar. Value undisclosed.
news.summary: AB Novaturas recently disclosed that a binding agreement was signed on March 7, 2025, by Ugnius Radvila, a member of the Company's Management Board. The agreement pertains to the sale of 740,702 shares in the company by Mr. Radvila to Neset Kockar, a prominent figure in the Turkish tourism industry. The exact value of the transaction has not been revealed as the main contract is still pending finalization.

news.headline: Small caps signal recession alarm, but credit markets unfazed. Russell 2000 down 17%, implying 52% recession chance. S&P 500 drops 8.7%.
news.summary: Wall Street is once again bracing for a possible recession, but opinions remain divided. JPMorgan's Nikolaos Panigirtzoglou notes that U.S. markets are conveying conflicting messages about the economy's future. Small-cap stocks, bond yields, and base metals are showing concerning signs, while credit markets appear unfazed, mirroring previous false alarms.The Russell 2000 small-cap index has plummeted 17% from its peak, suggesting a 52% chance of a U.S. recession based on past downturns. The iShares Russell 2000 ETF (NYSE:IWM), which tracks this index, has dipped 9.46% year-to-date and 11.47% in the last month. The S&P 500 ETF (ARCA: ) has also dropped by 8.7%. More insights available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Ellavoz Impact Capital finishes site improvements at Cedar Creek Estates in Jacksonville, Florida; to start vertical construction in April.
news.summary: Ellavoz Impact Capital (EIC), a prominent real estate impact investment and management firm based in Jacksonville, Florida, has successfully finished the site work for its latest project, Cedar Creek Estates. Situated within an Opportunity Zone in Jacksonville, the new project aims to address the increasing need for affordable, high-quality housing in the area. The company is set to commence vertical construction in April, marking a significant milestone in its innovative build-to-rent single-family residential community. This development comes at a crucial time as the demand for such housing solutions continues to rise in Jacksonville.
